---
title: Examples gallery
description: Studyflow patterns for experiments, pipelines, and reporting
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
---

These pages show patterns and worked examples drawn from real research and pipeline workflows. Each example is tagged by who it is most relevant to:

- <span class="badge bg-primary">Experimental</span> — study design, data collection, reporting.
- <span class="badge bg-success">Pipeline</span> — analysis, preprocessing, model training and deployment.
- <span class="badge bg-secondary">Both</span> — end-to-end examples that span data collection and analysis.

Use the categories filter below to narrow to your audience.
